title: Time Machine and drafts: version history and branching for all your data
summary: Every page, task, database, and canvas gains a Time Machine — scrub through its history with named versions, author colours, and one-click restore — and Patchwork-style drafts: fork content into a private working copy, review a three-way diff against a moving main, and merge back in one step. Assistant edits now land in a draft awaiting your review instead of touching live content.
